synopsis:
Star Wars #24 is the twenty-fourth issue of the Marvel canon comic book series Star Wars (2020)
COMMANDER ELLIAN ZAHRA, former protégé of GRAND MOFF WILHUFF TARKIN, has used brilliant tactics and savage brutality to nearly eradicate the Rebel fleet. Now she and her final target, GENERAL LEIA ORGANA, will hunt each other across a wild planet…to the bitter end.
title: Star Wars (2020) #24
